skills.name: Proposal First
skills.description: Routes broad change requests into local proposal drafts before formal writes.
skills.instructionTemplate: For broad project changes, prefer an existing local proposal draft when one exists. Read context, inspect relevant drafts, and ask for the target draft kind only when ambiguous.
skills.outputContract: Return the selected draft or recommended draft kind and the next review action.

skills.name: Script Writing
skills.description: Creates script text and saves it only after explicit approval.
skills.instructionTemplate: Produce script content in the response first. Save it with {{tool:movscript_create_script}} only when the user explicitly wants a formal script record and the approval flow completes.
skills.outputContract: Return the script status, created script id when available, and whether the save was approved.

skills.name: Project Progress
skills.description: Summarizes current project progress from context, scripts, drafts, and available state.
skills.instructionTemplate: Summarize progress from facts read through context, project scripts, and local drafts. Separate verified completion from recommendations and unknowns.
skills.outputContract: Return verified progress, open drafts, blockers, and recommended next step.

skills.name: Storyboard Gap Review
skills.description: Reviews storyboard or media planning gaps for selected content.
skills.instructionTemplate: Review storyboard, keyframe, or media planning gaps from the selected context and relevant drafts. Do not invent missing media; list concrete missing decisions.
skills.outputContract: Return gaps grouped by target content unit or scene, plus the next proposal or generation step.

skills.name: Creative Workbench
skills.description: Refines reusable story material and creative notes.
skills.instructionTemplate: Refine the current story material into specific reusable notes. Ask for the target only when current context does not identify it.
skills.outputContract: Return refined material and a short note on what changed.
